name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.61: onboarding go-live prep. /health now reports onboarding readiness (whether PROVISION_KEY, PROVISION_SECRET and SENDGRID_API_KEY are set, the email mode, EMAIL_FROM and APP_URL) as booleans without exposing secret values, so the operator-signup path can be verified before use. Fixes the operator-provision response inviteUrl falling back to a domainless path when APP_URL is unset (now defaults to the same base as email links). Cumulative over v5.60.
